data.title: Apple Stock Set For Streaming Lift? 'Severance' Breaks Record After X Ads, Tim Cook Promo
data.description: Apple broke streaming records with its second season of "Severance." Key marketing efforts may have helped with the viewership and member signups.

data.title: Builders FirstSource Q4 Earnings: EPS Beat, 8% Sales Decline, Commodity Deflation And More
data.description: Builders FirstSource reported a decline in Q4 sales, dropping 8% to $3.82 billion, missing estimates. Core organic sales fell 8.8%, with significant declines in Multi-Family and Single-Family markets.

data.title: IM-2 Launch On Track For Next Week: What's Going On With Intuitive Machines Stock Thursday?
data.description: Intuitive Machines Inc (NASDAQ:LUNR) shares are trading lower. The company on Thursday provided an update on its planned IM-2 mission.
